headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Lifts Texas Instruments Inc (TXN) Price Target. Here’s Why
summary: Texas Instruments Inc (NASDAQ:TXN) is one of the best stocks to buy according to David Greenspan’s Slate Path Capital.
